PRINCIPAL DEPUTIES

3031 STATE CAPITOL
SACRAMENTO 95814

107 SOUTH BROADWAY
LOS ANGELES 90012

Legislative Counsel
of California

GEORGE H. MURPHY

Sacramento, California

February 23, 1976

Honorable Howard L. Berman
Assembly Chamber

Conflicts of Interest - #3043

Dear Mr. Berman:

QUESTION

May members of the Assembly Ways and Means Committee vote on a bill providing for the refund of election filing fees where members of the committee may be among the beneficiaries of such a bill?

OPINION

An affected legislator may not vote in committee on a bill which will result in the return of his election filing fee. However, an affected legislator may vote on the vote for final passage of such legislation if he can do so impartially notwithstanding his interest and if he enters a statement to that effect in the journal before the vote is taken.
